source:
https://www.brwater.com/schedule/baton-rouge-water-company.html

Sewer site (unhelpful): https://www.brla.gov/1133/Sewer-Garbage-User-Fees

Sewer article: https://www.theadvocate.com/baton_rouge/news/article_096dc71c-2be3-11ea-aa6b-a3bb7db39a97.html

Sewer math: In the new year, customers in Baton Rouge, Central and unincorporated areas will pay $23.56 for the first 3,000 gallons and 57 cents for each 100 gallons after that.

Math: $23.56/3K gallons is $5.87 per ccf for first 4 ccfs. Then, $4.26 ccf after that (5.70 per 1K gallons)
